ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., district, charter) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget of the school */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Per-student budget */,
  "spending_range" TEXT /* Spending range of the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* District ID of the school */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "school_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "school_website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type FOREIGN KEY ("school_type") REFERENCES school_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the budget belongs to */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget of the school */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Per-student budget */,
  "budget_year" INTEGER /* Year of the budget */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source of the budget */,
  "allocation_category" TEXT /* Allocation category of the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spending_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spending range */,
  "range_name" TEXT /* Name of the spending range */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spending range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic performance record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the performance record belongs to */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the test */,
  "subject_area" TEXT /* Subject area of the test */,
  "avg_score" REAL /* Average score */,
  "passing_percent" REAL /* Percentage of students passing */,
  "overall_passing_percent" REAL /* Overall percentage of students passing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the administrator belongs to */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the administrator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the administrator's tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the administrator's tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_administrators_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the official */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
